case_title: EISLAN, STEPHEN VS TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORP.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY EISLAN, STEPHEN AS TO DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORP. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-15-2005 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
